message: Redesign core components with 3D effects, motion, and build fixes Major visual overhaul of the four most prominent interactive components, plus critical build fixes from missing imports left by concurrent agent edits. Nav.tsx: - Redesigned navigation with pill-style active indicator (replaces underline), animated logo with spring hover, indigo accent color - Added MagneticButton for "Go Pro" CTA with glow effect - Fixed missing AnimatePresence import (broke basket count animation) - Fixed missing MagneticButton import (broke Go Pro button render) - Fixed login URL: /login -> /sign-in (premium site uses /sign-in route, /login returned 404 and broke the login flow) - Animated basket count badge with AnimatePresence enter/exit PromptCard.tsx: - Added 3D perspective tilt on hover using useSpring + useMousePosition - Cursor-following radial glow (spotlight effect) on hover - Shimmer sweep animation on mount for premium feel - Terminal-style content preview via TerminalStream component - Featured content badge integration (FeaturedContentBadge) - Fixed import: useMousePositionInElement -> useMousePosition (the hook was renamed but the import wasn't updated) PromptDetailModal.tsx: - Staggered motion.div entrance animations for content sections - Enhanced variable customization panel with indigo accent styling - Bolder typography and increased spacing throughout - Fixed missing Zap import from lucide-react (token count icon) - Fixed JSX mismatch: -> (closing tag didn't match the opening , causing a parse error) BasketSidebar.tsx: - Replaced CSS transitions with framer-motion AnimatePresence for sidebar enter/exit (spring physics slide + backdrop blur) - Floating empty state animation with bouncing basket icon - Enhanced item cards with hover states and indigo accent borders - Added shimmer effect on the install command button - Added downloadBlob helper for cleaner file export logic - Fixed missing Terminal import from lucide-react Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6
